edges.child_node: "Nationwide, also can be found in Malaysia and Singapore"

Id1.text: Ayam penyet originates from Java where the Banyumasan are an ethnic group. It can be found nationwide and also in Singapore and Malaysia.

Id2.text: The dish Ayam penyet originates from Java where the Banyumasan people are an ethnic group. The dish can also be found in Malaysia and Singapore.
